drama.protagonistDesires: hold a damaged household together long enough for the truth to surface
drama.protagonistNeeds: accept that repair requires naming the wound honestly, even when it hurts
drama.protagonistFears: becoming the person who destroys the family by speaking the truth
drama.protagonistLies: if I keep the narrative stable, no one will have to face what really happened
drama.protagonistTruths: truthful naming, even late, is the only form of repair that matters
drama.protagonistContradictions: capable of holding the family together yet unable to name the wound that keeps it apart
drama.counterpartDesires: help without becoming the person who breaks the family narrative
drama.counterpartNeeds: choose direct commitment over guarded distance
drama.counterpartFears: being reduced to a function in someone else's grief
drama.counterpartTruths: shared risk can create stronger agency than isolation
drama.counterpartContradictions: loyal yet evasive, observant yet withholding
drama.pressureDesires: protect the existing family narrative that benefits them
drama.pressureNeeds: maintain control at any moral cost
drama.pressureFears: public exposure and loss of authority within the family
drama.pressureContradictions: calm yet coercive, rational yet self-serving

detective-police.protagonistDesires: prove that a staged death was political murder
detective-police.protagonistNeeds: accept that procedure sometimes protects the wrong people
detective-police.protagonistFears: becoming responsible for irreversible harm to a witness
detective-police.protagonistLies: if I follow procedure correctly, the truth will survive the institution
detective-police.protagonistTruths: truth sometimes requires breaking the procedure meant to protect it
detective-police.protagonistContradictions: committed to procedure yet increasingly aware that procedure is the obstacle
detective-police.counterpartDesires: cooperate without exposing themselves to institutional retaliation
detective-police.counterpartNeeds: choose direct commitment over guarded distance
detective-police.counterpartFears: being reduced to a function in someone else's investigation
detective-police.counterpartTruths: shared risk can create stronger agency than isolation
detective-police.counterpartContradictions: loyal yet evasive, observant yet withholding
detective-police.pressureDesires: protect the existing order that benefits them
detective-police.pressureNeeds: maintain control at any moral cost
detective-police.pressureFears: public exposure and loss of authority
detective-police.pressureContradictions: calm yet coercive, rational yet self-serving

science-fiction.protagonistDesires: restore a corrupted memory lattice before governance seals it
science-fiction.protagonistNeeds: accept that civic memory requires the right to remember, not just to store
science-fiction.protagonistFears: becoming responsible for destabilizing the station's order
science-fiction.protagonistLies: if I repair the system correctly, civic memory and stability can coexist
science-fiction.protagonistTruths: consent requires the right to remember, even when remembering destabilizes order
science-fiction.protagonistContradictions: technically capable of repair yet increasingly aware that repair is political
science-fiction.counterpartDesires: help without becoming complicit in system control
science-fiction.counterpartNeeds: choose direct commitment over guarded distance
science-fiction.counterpartFears: being reduced to a function in someone else's system
science-fiction.counterpartTruths: shared risk can create stronger agency than isolation
science-fiction.counterpartContradictions: loyal yet evasive, observant yet withholding
science-fiction.pressureDesires: protect the existing order that benefits them
science-fiction.pressureNeeds: maintain control at any moral cost
science-fiction.pressureFears: public exposure and loss of authority
science-fiction.pressureContradictions: calm yet coercive, rational yet self-serving

fantasy.protagonistDesires: lift the curse that is devouring the valley
fantasy.protagonistNeeds: accept that redemption requires relinquishing inherited identity
fantasy.protagonistFears: becoming responsible for destroying the family's protection
fantasy.protagonistLies: if I honor the inherited rituals, the valley will remain protected
fantasy.protagonistTruths: truthful naming, even at the cost of inheritance, is the only form of belonging that matters
fantasy.protagonistContradictions: bound to the bloodline yet increasingly aware that the bloodline is the problem
fantasy.counterpartDesires: guide without revealing the full cost of truth
fantasy.counterpartNeeds: choose direct commitment over guarded distance
fantasy.counterpartFears: being reduced to a function in someone else's ritual
fantasy.counterpartTruths: shared risk can create stronger agency than isolation
fantasy.counterpartContradictions: loyal yet evasive, observant yet withholding
fantasy.pressureDesires: protect the existing order that benefits them
fantasy.pressureNeeds: maintain control at any moral cost
fantasy.pressureFears: public exposure and loss of authority
fantasy.pressureContradictions: calm yet coercive, rational yet self-serving

romance-relational.protagonistDesires: save a failing family studio without surrendering independence
romance-relational.protagonistNeeds: accept that honest interdependence is stronger than guarded competence
romance-relational.protagonistFears: becoming vulnerable to the same abandonment that broke the last partnership
romance-relational.protagonistLies: if I keep the collaboration professional, I can protect both the work and myself
romance-relational.protagonistTruths: honest interdependence is stronger than guarded competence
romance-relational.protagonistContradictions: capable of deep collaboration yet unable to name the feeling that collaboration reveals
romance-relational.counterpartDesires: help without becoming easy to use
romance-relational.counterpartNeeds: choose direct commitment over guarded distance
romance-relational.counterpartFears: being reduced to a function in someone else's crisis
romance-relational.counterpartTruths: shared risk can create stronger agency than isolation
romance-relational.counterpartContradictions: loyal yet evasive, observant yet withholding
